sector: Wellness / Arte (Estudio de Pilates Clásico + Galería de Arte)

logo.descripcion: Logo basado en texto 'Indigo' en la navegación del header

secciones.contenido: Indigo Flow and Art combines Classical Pilates and Fine Art into a space that invites your creativity and vitality to bloom.

Pilates registration is located in the vibrant gallery of local artist and co-owner, Julie Hughes, at 1272 Pendleton Street. Following check-in, walk through our old French doors into the beautiful, light-filled Pilates room where a fully equipped Gratz Pilates studio awaits.

The Pilates studio and Art Gallery are open by appointment. Please see contact information below to schedule a Pilates session or gallery walk-through.

PILATES STUDIO: Katie at 864.884.5606

ART GALLERY: Julie at 864.884.5607

Indigo Pilates is a Classical Pilates studio instructing students in Joseph Pilates' original Contrology Method.

All students at Indigo begin with private sessions to understand the fundamentals of 'connection' before progressing through the system.

How To Begin:
Step 1: Review pricing and time-slot tabs; calendar books monthly and becomes available when recurring students cancel.
Step 2: Text Katie at 864.884.5606 for upcoming availabilities within the month to reserve your time-slot.
Step 3: Arrive at the studio 10 mins prior to first appointment to complete paperwork and pay for session.

imagenes.descripcion: Imagen de la instructora Katie Hughes Ryan

secciones.contenido:
New Student Special:
- 3 Intro Privates: $210 (new students only)

Drop-In Sessions:
- 1 Private: $95
- 1 Duet: $120 ($60/student)
- Small Group: $150 ($50/student)

10-Session Packages:
- 10 Private Sessions: $750
- 10 Duet Sessions: $550 (per student)
- 10 Small Group Sessions: $400 (per student)

All rates listed are the 'cash price' accepted via cash, check or zelle. All Debit/Credit cards purchases incur a 3% transaction fee. All sales final.

Studio calendar is booked out one month at a time. Please text Katie at 864.884.5606 for this month's openings!

Fully Certified Classical Pilates Instructor (Power Pilates, Charlotte & NYC). 500-hour Registered Yoga Instructor. 300-hour AYAMA Applied Yoga Anatomy Muscle Activation Instructor. Background includes ballet, contemporary dance, competitive figure-skating, yoga, and Pilates. Emphasizes form-focused, athletic yet attainable approach.

Through my work, I strive to combine the every-day with the ephemeral. To capture real moments that are viewed from a surreal lens.

My themes are not concerned with what the world should be, but rather with what the world is—while choosing to see reality with slight distortions.

I strive to communicate the essence, power and movement of a scene or a person.

My recent works are all about motion, specifically motion as we see it in the art of bicycle racing.

It's all about speed, motion, and gravity-defying angles, and how such intangible things can be put on canvas.

secciones.contenido:
Katie Hughes Ryan — CO-OWNER, Indigo Pilates
Certified Classical Pilates Instructor, 500-hour Registered Yoga Instructor, 300-hour AYAMA instructor. Background includes ballet, contemporary dance, figure-skating, yoga and Pilates. Specializes in form-focused, athletic movement with emphasis on Joseph Pilates' Contrology methodology.

Julie Hughes — CO-OWNER, Indigo Art
Artist focusing on capturing everyday moments through surreal lens. Recent works emphasize motion, particularly bicycle racing and human figure painting. Seeks to convey speed, movement, and energy in tangible visual form.
